item.name: Moon-hopper Identification Key
item.description: A thin, rectangular piece of some unknown material. Placing it near your moon-hopper will magically bring the machine to life.

mount.name: Moon-hopper
mount.action: Summon forth the moon-hopper. Guaranteed to instill a sense of well-being within all those in earshot.
mount.description: This enhanced version of the supporter was lovingly created by the ever-innovative Inventingway. Not satisfied with merely making it ridable, the Loporrit also fitted a compact speaker that can belt out Dreamingway's feel-good sounds.
mount.tooltip:
Well, then, let's hop to it!
- Dreamingway
